description: CompositionBlack hooded and filled jacket with the shell, filling and inner lining made of 100% polyester, has full raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, adidas patented 3-Stripes running from the shoulders to the cuffs, removable hood with mock collar, full front zipper, ribbed hem, two pockets at the waist, club badge appliqued on the left chest and embroidered branding on the right chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with all fasteners closed, using a mild detergentDo not use softenersDo not ironWear it as a hoodie or as a jacket, and this jacket offers absolute comfort both ways. Made with insulated filling and crafted with a sporty look, this jacket from adidas makes for a perfect buy.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 6'3", Shoulders: 19"
